Serial.UrlPlaceholder: Paste the ČSFD series overview URL…
Serial.NoSeasonsParsed: Could not read seasons and episode counts from this page (expected a “Série … epizod” block on the overview).
Serial.EpisodeRangeInvalid: “From episode” cannot be greater than “to episode”.
Serial.BatchComplete: Done. New downloads (unique links): {0}. Skipped — nothing on hosts: {1}. Skipped — same link already in this batch: {2}.
Serial.FootNotice: For each episode we only search the hosts over HTTP (no video download yet), compare hits, then download one best link — one video per episode. We do not download from every result page in parallel. Hosts may still offer one file for several episodes, or links may be missing — try another source or wait. Saves under subfolders by series title and season (Season N) in your download folder from settings.
Serial.HistoryBatchTap: Click the row to see all downloaded episodes.

Appearance.AccentRedDesc: Primary buttons, selected sidebar item, strong borders, and related gradients.
Appearance.AccentBlueDesc: Secondary actions (e.g. open folder in history).
Appearance.BorderPrimaryDesc: Light outlines for panels and fields.
Appearance.BorderAccentDesc: Stronger outlines; often matches the primary red accent.
